days.label: Push Day — Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 — 10/10/8 last week but RPE ran 7/9/10. Set 3 was a grind at the bottom of the range. Earn the bump by getting all 3 sets to 10 reps at RPE 8 or under. Pause at chest, drive through heels.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 35 — earned it with a clean 10/10/10 RPE 7/7/7. 30 degree incline, control the negative. 40s may slow you down at first; settle in the 8-10 range.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 25 — you finally hit 10/10/10 at RPE 7 across the board. Brace your core, don't lean back. Settle into 8-10 with the 30s.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 10 — you ran 12/12/12 RPE 7 again (you wisely skipped the brutal jump to 15). Instead of forcing +5, add a 1-2 sec hold at the top of each rep this week. That extra time-under-tension is your progression. Slight bend in the elbows.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 — 10/10/8 last week, set 3 dropped to 8 at RPE 9 (triceps cooked from bench). In range but not at the top. Get all 3 sets to 10 at RPE 8 to earn the bump. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked, full lockout.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in from overhead rope (that hit RPE 10 last week at 45, too heavy overhead). Elbows pinned to your sides, split the rope at the bottom, full extension. Pick a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps — 5 min

days.label: Pull Day — Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 — solid 8/8/8 at RPE 8 last week, but that's the bottom of the range. Push for 9-10 reps this week to earn the jump to 205. Brace hard, pull through the floor, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 — you got 10/10/10 but RPE climbed to 8 on sets 2-3. Top of the range but too hard. Get all 3 sets to RPE 7 to earn 50. Each side, squeeze at the top, control the descent.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: UP 10 lb from 90 — clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7 last week, easy bump. Wide grip on the lat bar, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats, no leaning back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Flye
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in from cable face pulls for rear-delt variety. Hinge at the hips, slight elbow bend, squeeze the shoulder blades, lead with the pinkies. Light weight — pick something you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 60 — clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7. Strict form, no swing, full squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 25 — you nailed 12/12/12 at RPE 7. Neutral grip, control the negative, no swinging the 30s up.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back — 5 min

days.label: Leg Day — Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 — leg day has been getting skipped for a few weeks, so no new data. Let's actually log this one. 165 should sit around RPE 8 for 8-10. Below parallel, brace your core, drive through the heels.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 135 — no recent leg log. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins. Get all sets to RPE 7 and we'll bump to 145.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 — rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. Each leg. Push for 11-12 clean reps per side.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 — upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top. Hit 12/12/12 to earn the bump to 65.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in on the leg-curl attachment to balance out all the hamstring hinging. Curl your heels toward your glutes, control the negative, full range of motion. Pick a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Slow and controlled — 3 sec out, 3 sec back, opposite arm and leg. Keep your lower back pressed flat to the floor the whole time. If bodyweight is easy, hold a 5-10 lb DB behind your head.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors — 5 min
